title: derris ornithocephala
intro: Derris ornithocephala, also known as the Derris plant, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa and Asia. This plant contains rotenone, a natural insecticide and medicinal compound, which has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The medicinal properties of Derris ornithocephala have been found to possess anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it a potential remedy for several health issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine, offering a natural approach to promoting overall health and wellness.
